windows_detail.note: storefront with security grilles and mural

storefront.mural: large colourful fruit/flower mural on right storefront, graffiti tags on upper brick

condition_notes: Extensive graffiti tags on upper brick facade. Storefront painted dark green over original material. Awning worn. Mural adds character but indicates informal modification. Diamond security grilles on all ground-floor openings.

windows_detail.note: full storefront with security grilles, three commercial units visible
upper facade is painted plywood/signboard with large mural and graffiti, no conventional windows visible

storefront.signage_text: Pasta Bar & Lounge (left unit); centre unit unclear; right unit with blue neon interior
storefront.notes: Three separate commercial units across the full ground floor. Diamond-pattern security grilles on all. AC unit visible on upper facade between mural panels.

condition_notes: Upper facade entirely covered with painted plywood panels, colourful street art mural (left) and large white graffiti tags (right). Original brick mostly concealed. Security grilles on all storefronts. Heavily modified from original form. Utility pole partially obstructs view.

windows_detail.note: storefront - Kensington Market sign with Property For Sale sign

storefront.signage_text: KENSINGTON MARKET (large horizontal sign, blue/yellow letters); Property For Sale 416.649.5943
storefront.notes: Adjacent to #60 (Exile Vintage). Vinyl siding covers upper floors. Ground floor has large display windows with diamond security grilles.

decorative_elements.gable_mural: painted mural with horses/birds/stars on gable wall (whimsical folk art style)

condition_notes: Vinyl siding covers original facade material. Gable features painted folk-art mural with horses, birds and stars on dark brown background. Property listed for sale. Storefronts modified with modern security grilles.

windows_detail.note: Exile Vintage storefront with large display window and security grille

storefront.signage_text: EXILE (large red/yellow letters); blue and white striped awning with yellow sawtooth trim

awning.colour: blue and white stripes with yellow trim

storefront.notes: Exile Vintage shop. Striking yellow facade paint on brick surround. Blue/white striped awning with zigzag yellow bottom edge.

decorative_elements.gable_mural: folk-art mural with flying horses, birds, and stars on dark brown background, large red EXILE letters

condition_notes: Facade heavily painted yellow over original brick. Gable features same folk-art mural as #58 (horses, birds, stars). EXILE lettering in red with yellow. Blue/white striped awning distinctive. Security diamond grille on storefront. Property For Sale sign visible on adjacent unit.

windows_detail.note: full-width storefront display windows with diamond security grilles

storefront.signage_text: KENSINGTON LEATHER FASHION (partially visible on window); 67 (address number visible on fascia)
storefront.notes: Single-storey commercial building. Two large display windows flanking central door. Yellow trim band above awning line. Graffiti on bulkhead panels below windows (blue/white paint, tags).

condition_notes: Single storey heavily modified commercial building. Striped awning faded and sagging. Diamond security grilles on all openings. Graffiti tags on bulkhead panels. Blue/white painted base panels peeling. Purple/blue mural visible on left party wall. Overall appearance worn.

windows_detail.note: full storefront with Tutti Frutti signage and display windows

storefront.signage_text: TUTTI FRUTTI FAMOUS FOODS INC. - DRY FRUITS & NUTS, IMPORTED & DOMESTIC, CHEESE, COLD CUTS, EUROPEAN DELICATESSEN
storefront.notes: European delicatessen. Box-style illuminated sign with detailed text. Display windows showing products. Upper floor shows buff/cream brick with two windows. Graffiti on right party wall area. Adjacent signage for Kalle's visible.

condition_notes: Upper brick appears in reasonable condition, buff/cream colour. Storefront modernized with illuminated box sign. Graffiti tags visible on adjacent surfaces. Security grilles present. Some surface grime on brick.

windows_detail.note: BAZAAR Gift Shop storefront with large display window

storefront.notes: Large display window occupies most of ground floor. Upper floor shows buff/cream brick with single wide 4-pane window. Building appears narrow.

condition_notes: Upper brick appears buff/cream, reasonably maintained. Storefront modernized. Night lighting makes colour assessment approximate. Building appears relatively narrow compared to neighbours.

storefront.signage_text: unclear at night, possibly vacant or small shop
storefront.notes: Red vertical pilaster/column divides facade between storefront and residential section. Large multi-pane storefront window on right. Left side has wood clapboard siding with two residential windows. Graffiti on right party wall.

condition_notes: Wood clapboard siding showing age and wear. Red-painted vertical pilaster/column accent. Storefront window multipane appears original or heritage-style. Graffiti visible on adjacent wall. Overall tired appearance. Utility wires prominent.

windows_detail.note: TribalEye storefront with three-panel display window and door

storefront.notes: Distinctive yellow-painted storefront surround with green zigzag/sawtooth decorative trim at top. Three-panel display window. TRIBAL written vertically on left pilaster, EYE below. LITE UP written on right side. Decorative eye symbol. Upper floor is cream/beige painted brick or stucco with two standard windows.

condition_notes: Facade painted cream/beige. Storefront surround painted bright yellow with distinctive green zigzag trim. Display windows clean. Upper windows appear functional. No grilles. Some wear on painted surfaces.

windows_detail.note: storefront entirely covered with graffiti/mural art and painted panels

storefront.signage_text: 75 (address visible in yellow); storefront appears to be a small shop or closed unit
storefront.notes: Ground floor almost entirely covered in black paint and large-scale silver/white graffiti artwork. Small display window at bottom. Address 75 visible in yellow paint. Upper floor shows cream/beige painted wall with single window. Left side of building shows painted stucco with scoring pattern visible.

condition_notes: Ground floor entirely covered in graffiti/street art - black painted surface with large silver/white tag. Original facade material completely concealed at ground level. Upper floor painted cream/beige shows scored pattern suggesting stucco over masonry. Red cone visible at base. Adjacent to TribalEye (#73) with yellow trim partially visible.

windows_detail.note: Global Cheese Shoppe storefront with two large display windows flanking central entrance

storefront.signage_text: GLOBAL CHEESE - WHEN IT COMES TO CHEESE..... WE SPEAK YOUR LANGUAGE!

awning.colour: blue background with white text and Global Cheese logo

storefront.notes: Iconic Kensington Market cheese shop. Large blue illuminated sign spans full storefront width. Two large display windows with products visible, decorated with Christmas wreaths. Central entrance with diamond security grille. Canadian flag visible in upper floor window. Small Global Cheese sign also on upper floor. Painted white/cream brick with diamond decorative patterns visible in brickwork.

decorative_elements.diamond_pattern_note: Small diamond/lozenge patterns visible in painted brick facade at upper level, indicating decorative polychromatic brickwork beneath paint

condition_notes: Well-maintained commercial property. Painted brick in good condition. Iconic signage intact and illuminated. Display windows well-kept. Diamond decorative brick patterns visible through paint suggest heritage detail. Canadian flag displayed. Christmas wreaths on display windows suggest active seasonal dressing. Upper floor windows functional.

windows_detail.note: Global Cheese storefront - oblique angle showing full signage and display

storefront.signage_text: GLOBAL CHEESE - WHEN IT COMES TO CHEESE..... WE SPEAK YOUR LANGUAGE!
storefront.notes: Oblique angle confirms: blue illuminated sign, central grille door, two display windows with wreaths. Upper floor shows 3 windows, one with Canadian flag. Diamond brick patterns more clearly visible from this angle - approximately 4 diamond motifs across upper facade. Right party wall shows plain masonry.

condition_notes: Same building as previous angle. Oblique view confirms diamond decorative brickwork patterns in painted surface. Right party wall visible - plain light-coloured masonry. Upper windows evenly spaced. Building well-maintained for commercial use.

windows_detail.note: Blissie storefront with large blue-painted display window and security grille

storefront.signage_text: Blissie (light blue sign with yellow dot on 'i')
storefront.notes: Storefront painted light blue (baby blue). Large display window with horizontal security grille. Blissie sign with playful typography. Upper floor has buff/golden brick with two windows. Third floor partially visible with pink/mauve painted wall and metal balcony railing (possibly belonging to this or adjacent building). Adjacent to Global Cheese (#76) on left.

condition_notes: Upper floor buff/golden brick in reasonable condition. Storefront painted baby blue, modern commercial fit-out. Horizontal security grille bars (not diamond pattern). Pink/mauve wall visible at top may be third floor or adjacent. Metal balcony railing visible at upper level.

windows_detail.note: Love, Calista storefront with large multi-pane display window

storefront.signage_text: LOVE, CALISTA - Cute Little Cute Things (pink mural with checkerboard pattern and flowers)
storefront.notes: Corner/end-of-terrace building. Large multi-pane display window (approximately 4x4 grid). Pink-painted storefront with elaborate mural signage featuring checkerboard pattern, flowers, and cursive text. White scalloped awning above display window. Upper floor shows buff/golden brick with two windows. Small black awning on left side entrance.

condition_notes: Well-maintained commercial property. Upper brick facade in good condition. Storefront attractively decorated with pink mural and scalloped white awning. Large display window clean and well-dressed. Address '80' visible. Night photo but building well-lit.

windows_detail.note: two commercial storefronts - Blaze District Cannabis and Dirty Bird Chicken & Waffles

storefront.signage_text: DIRTY BIRD - CHICKEN + WAFFLES (right); BLAZE DISTRICT CANNABIS (left, with phone 437-580-7418)
storefront.notes: Large 3-storey building with two ground-floor commercial units. Dirty Bird occupies right side with illuminated signs and menu boards. Blaze District Cannabis on left with colourful cannabis-themed signage and backlit display. Upper two floors have matching 6-over-6 sash windows, 4 per floor, painted white frames on cream/white stucco facade. Building wider than typical Kensington row houses.

condition_notes: Upper floors painted stucco/render in cream/white. Windows appear heritage 6-over-6 pattern, well-maintained white frames. Ground floor heavily commercialized with modern signage. Some staining visible on upper facade. Overall structurally sound appearance. Large building by Kensington standards.

note: This file was not found at the Kensington Ave path but was found at Kensington Ave _ Baldwin St path

windows_detail.note: Fun Guyz Magic Mushroom storefront with colourful graffiti-art facade

storefront.signage_text: FUN GUYZ - MAGIC MUSHROOMS; PREMIUM CANNABIS (with phone 437-580-7418); products listed: VAPES, HASH, FLOWERS, GUMMIES, CHOCOLATES, INFUSED PREROLLS
storefront.notes: Corner unit of the same 3-storey building as 77-79 Kensington. Baldwin St elevation. Ground floor wrapped in colourful cartoon/pop-art graffiti style murals. Premium Cannabis illuminated sign board on right. Fun Guyz signage prominent. Upper two floors cream/white stucco with 6-over-6 heritage-style windows matching the Kensington Ave elevation.

condition_notes: Same building as 77-79 Kensington Ave, Baldwin St elevation. Upper floors cream stucco in fair condition. Ground floor entirely wrapped in colourful pop-art murals and commercial signage. Heritage windows visible on upper floors. Street light and utility wires prominent.

note: DAYTIME photo - best colour reference for this building

windows_detail.note: Love Calista storefront - large multi-pane display window with pink painted surround

storefront.signage_text: LOVE CALISTA - Cute Little Cute Things (pink hand-painted mural with pink/white checkerboard, flowers, stars)
storefront.notes: DAYTIME REFERENCE: Corner building clearly visible. Upper floor is golden/buff brick in running bond, daylight confirms hex ~#C8985C. Two second-floor windows with dark frames. Large storefront window (approx 4x4 pane grid) with white scalloped awning above. Entire storefront surround painted pink (approx #E8A0B0 in daylight). Pink mural extends above storefront to brick line with 'Love Calista' text, flowers, and checkerboard pattern. Left entrance door with '80' address number. Small black triangular awning over left door. Neon 'Open' sign visible. Adjacent building to right shows different business (A Skye Jewelry visible). Street view shows looking south down Kensington Ave with parked cars. Light pole in foreground.

condition_notes: Daytime view confirms building in good condition. Buff/golden brick clean and intact on upper floor. Pink-painted storefront well-maintained. Scalloped awning clean and white. Display windows clean. Address number clearly visible. This is the best colour reference for this building - nighttime photos skew warm due to sodium lighting.

address: Kensington Ave streetscape (south end near Dundas)
note: Streetscape overview, not a single building facade

storefront.signage_text: Last Pint Vintage (left corner building); various other signage
storefront.notes: Wide street-level view looking north up Kensington Ave from near Dundas St. Left foreground: corner building with vivid red/orange demonic mural covering ground floor (Last Pint Vintage). Blue/purple car parked in front. Background: row of 2-storey buildings visible including flat-roofed commercial blocks and at least one gable-roofed building with decorative Victorian bargeboard (visible on right side of image). Street is empty at night. Multiple gable profiles visible in background skyline. This photo is useful for establishing street rhythm, building heights, and skyline silhouette.

condition_notes: Streetscape view showing typical Kensington Market character. Mix of 1-2-3 storey buildings. Corner building entirely wrapped in vivid red/orange/purple mural art. Background buildings show mix of flat and gable roofs. At least two Victorian gable profiles visible in skyline (right side). Street has typical market atmosphere with informal commercial modifications.

streetscape_notes.skyline_features: at least 2 Victorian gable profiles visible, 1 decorative bargeboard, mix of flat roofs
streetscape_notes.street_character: narrow market street, informal commercial, heavy mural/graffiti art

address: 181 Baldwin St / 77 Kensington Ave corner (from Kensington Ave _ Baldwin St folder)
note: Corner view from Baldwin St side - same building as entry 16 but different folder path. Shows Baldwin St elevation more clearly.

windows_detail.note: Fun Guyz storefront wrapped in pop-art murals

storefront.signage_text: FUN GUYZ - MAGIC MUSHROOMS; PREMIUM CANNABIS 437-580-7418; VAPES, HASH, FLOWERS, GUMMIES, CHOCOLATES, INFUSED PREROLLS
storefront.notes: Baldwin St elevation of corner building. This angle shows more of the Baldwin frontage. Ground floor features colourful cartoon pop-art graffiti covering all surfaces. Premium Cannabis illuminated display board on right side. Fun Guyz branding in colourful letters. Upper floors cream/white stucco with heritage-pattern 6-over-6 windows. Window count may differ between Kensington and Baldwin elevations. Street light and utility pole prominent. Perspective shows the building wrapping the corner.

condition_notes: Baldwin St view of corner building. Same condition as Kensington Ave elevation. Upper stucco in fair condition with minor staining. Heritage windows intact. Ground floor completely commercialized with pop-art wrap.
